summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. A booking-style photo of a young man with a thin mustache is shown over a spinning globe graphic; the lower-third reads MIGRANT CHARGED W/ SHERIDAN GORMAN MURDER IN COURT. The segment cuts to a screenshot of a Department of Homeland Security document with highlighted passages noting the subject was released on recognizance and could not provide a valid U.S. address.

script.scene: A booking-style photo over a globe graphic; lower-third reads MIGRANT CHARGED W/ SHERIDAN GORMAN MURDER IN COURT.
A DHS document screenshot with highlighted text about release on recognizance is displayed.
Continued display of the document under the same banner.

notable_text: MIGRANT CHARGED W/ SHERIDAN GORMAN MURDER IN COURT; DISPOSITION; released on recognizance; SUBJECT HAS NO ID
